channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump says peace deal will be signed Sunday after Iran said it remains cautious on timing
item.description: President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that a deal to end the war with Iran will be signed on Sunday.

item.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
item.description: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

item.title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
item.description: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran.

item.title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
item.description: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.

item.title: This wealth advisor stock should benefit as clients get rich from SpaceX IPO, says Baird
item.description: San Francisco-based wealth advisor Andersen Group is a less-than-obvious beneficiary of the SpaceX IPO, according to Baird.

item.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
item.description: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

item.title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
item.description: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate

item.title: Trump to meet with Mideast leaders, attend Ukraine session at G7, U.S. officials say
item.description: Trump is scheduled to travel to Evian, France, for the G7 summit early Monday after attending Sunday's mixed-martial-arts event at the White House.

item.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
item.description: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.

item.title: Goldman says stocks like Nvidia have more room to run
item.description: Analysts at Goldman Sachs named several stocks that have defensive attributes that they say also offer plenty of upside.

item.title: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
item.description: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.

item.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
item.description: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.

item.title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
item.description: In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors.

item.title: Trump's name is gone from the Kennedy Center's facade, according to a top official at the arts venue
item.description: Dozens of people spent hours on Friday on the plaza in front of the Kennedy Center, occasionally cheering as they broke into chants of "take it down."

item.title: These stocks are the most overbought or oversold after a choppy week on Wall Street
item.description: Reaction to earnings reports led Adobe to become oversold, while J.M. Smucker Company was left overbought.

item.title: SpaceX IPO takeaways: SPCX closes at $161, jumping 19% after record debut
item.description: SpaceX rallied in its first day as a public company. CNBC provided updates throughout the day.

item.title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
item.description: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.

item.title: New student loan plan comes with higher bills for many. Tax planning can help cut your payments
item.description: With some planning, federal student loan borrowers can save on their monthly bills under the U.S. Department of Education's new repayment plan.

item.title: Rivian CEO taking different approach than Elon Musk for humanoid robotics company
item.description: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe started a robotics company late last year called Mind Robotics that he says has has raised more than $1 billion.

item.title: U.S. opens its home World Cup with a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay, sparked by Balogun's 2 goals
item.description: Balogun scored twice in the Americans' three-goal barrage before halftime in a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay.

item.title: What drove the stock market last week — before and after SpaceX's historic IPO
item.description: The successful debut of Elon Musk's rocket company wiped away a week of anxiety.

item.title: IPO investing: What are IPO stocks and the best brokers for IPO access?
item.description: Some brokerages offer IPO access before a company goes public, but anyone can buy shares once trading begins.

item.title: Beijing says it's 'strongly dissatisfied' with Pentagon move against top Chinese tech firms
item.description: The Pentagon added a slew of Chinese tech firms, including Alibaba, Baidu and BYD, to a list of entities it believes have aided China's military.

item.title: Judge orders Trump administration to restore National Park changes at sites that 'disparaged' U.S.
item.description: The Trump administration must also provide a weekly status report describing the progress it's made with these changes, the judge wrote.

item.title: This 28-year-old paid off her law school loans selling stickers and coloring books
item.description: Elyse Burns started selling her art on Etsy when she turned 18. Now she's paid off her student loans and did nearly $5 million last year.

item.title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
item.description: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.

item.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
item.description: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

item.title: Stocks end higher as SpaceX soars in debut, U.S.-Iran deal nears
item.description: Stocks rose on Friday as SpaceX's opening pop bolstered sentiment, with investors hoping for the arrival of a potential peace deal between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang
item.description: Trump on Friday said U.S. forces carried out a ⁠strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, the leader of Venezuelan ​gang Tren de Aragua.

item.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
item.description: Kevin Warsh will hold his first Fed meeting, giving markets the first public look at how he'll communicate as chair of the Federal Reserve.
